overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in a dark coat walking through a moonlit forest at night. The character passes a large skeleton remains, encounters a herd of deer, and emerges into an open grassland with a lit lantern post and distant castle visible.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through the dense forest

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the forest path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
rocky outcrops and boulders along the left side of the path
large fallen tree trunk lying on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense pine forest at night, following a narrow dirt trail. Tall trees create a canopy overhead with moonlight filtering through, while rocky terrain and fallen logs line the path.

events.description: large animal skeleton comes into view on the left side of the path
character turns slightly toward the skeleton while passing to observe it

agents.ego_description: walking past and observing the large skeletal remains on the ground

entered.detail: large bleached bones and ribcage of a dead animal lying beside the path
cluster of large grey stones surrounding the skeleton

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a large animal skeleton lying beside the path. The bleached white bones stand out against the dark forest floor, surrounded by stone rocks.

events.description: herd of deer appears in the forest clearing ahead
deer scatter and run across the path as character approaches

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of deer in the forest clearing

notable_agents.action: deer standing in the path before scattering and running away into the trees

entered.detail: group of deer with antlers grazing in the clearing
grass-covered slope rising on the right side of the clearing

segments.scene_description: Entering a forest clearing where several deer are grazing. As the character approaches, the deer become startled and run across the path, disappearing into the trees on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path with lantern lighting

events.description: exiting dense forest into open grassland with visible lantern post
approaching lit wooden lantern post casting warm light on the path

agents.ego_description: walking toward a lit lantern post with a distant castle visible on the horizon

entered.detail: wooden post with a lit lantern casting warm orange light on the ground
large dark castle or fortress silhouetted against the night sky on the horizon
simple wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the forest into an open grassland area. A wooden lantern post illuminates the path ahead with warm light, while a large castle structure becomes visible in the distant background against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, moonlit pine forest that gradually opens into a wide grassland beneath a night sky. It begins by following a narrow dirt trail through a canopy of tall trees, moving past rocky terrain and fallen logs. As the path continues, the camera passes a set of bleached white animal bones resting against the dark forest floor before entering a clearing where a herd of grazing deer startles and scatters into the trees. The scene then shifts as the forest thins, emerging into an open field where a wooden lantern post casts a warm glow over the path. Finally, the view expands to reveal a large castle structure looming in the distant background.
